title: osmanthus racemosus
intro: Osmanthus racemosus, also known as Sweet Olive or Tea Olive, is a flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its clusters of small white flowers and fragrant foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, attributed to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Osmanthus racemosus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Osmanthus racemosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make various remedies, including teas, capsules, and topical creams.
